schemas.definition: z.object({ status: z.enum(['pending','paid','partial','waived']).optional(), search: z.string().optional(), page: z.number().int().min(1).default(1), limit: z.number().int().min(1).max(100).default(25) })

z.object({ payments: z.array(z.object({ paymentId: z.string(), enrollmentId: z.string(), parentName: z.string(), childName: z.string(), programName: z.string(), amountDue: z.number(), amountReceived: z.number(), remainingBalance: z.number(), status: z.enum(['pending','paid','partial','waived']), paymentMethod: z.string().nullable(), lastUpdated: z.string().datetime() })), total: z.number(), page: z.number(), limit: z.number() })

z.object({ paymentId: z.string(), enrollmentId: z.string(), parentName: z.string(), parentEmail: z.string(), childName: z.string(), programName: z.string(), amountDue: z.number(), amountReceived: z.number(), remainingBalance: z.number(), status: z.enum(['pending','paid','partial','waived']), paymentMethod: z.string().nullable(), notes: z.string().nullable(), priceBreakdown: z.array(z.object({ label: z.string(), amount: z.number() })), createdAt: z.string().datetime(), lastUpdated: z.string().datetime() })
z.object({ status: z.enum(['pending','paid','partial','waived']), amountReceived: z.number().min(0), paymentMethod: z.string().optional(), notes: z.string().optional() })

z.object({ enrollmentId: z.string(), programName: z.string(), childName: z.string(), amountDue: z.number(), zelleRecipientName: z.string(), zelleContactInfo: z.string(), referenceNote: z.string(), customInstructions: z.string().nullable() })
